chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-637 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.2907/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 21-5-2025 Mr. Mir Muhammad Shaikh, along with petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G along with Inspector Ahsan Ali Gaho, I.O of Crime No.37/2025 P.S Sorah, District Khairpur.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Safdar Ali Jogi, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent No.5, taken on record. Statements along with certain documents, have been filed by respondent No.2,3 and 4, which are also taken on record. The Investigation Officer of FIR bearing Crime No.37/2025 of Police Station Sorah, District Khairpur is present and on direction of this Court has recorded statement u/s 161 Cr.P.C of the petitioner No.1 namely Monika wherein she denied the allegation of such FIR and supported the contentions made in the instant petition. She further submitted that she was previously a Hindu, but has since embraced Islam and entered into marriage with petitioner No.2 (Bashir Ahmed) of her own free will and choice. I.O submitted such statement of Monika, which is taken on record. I.O further submits that after the statement of petitioner Mst. Monika, he will file report by cancelling the case under “C” class. Such exercise shall be completed by the I.O within 15 days. After the statement of the I.O, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition and prayed that legal protection may be provided to the petitioners. The petition is disposed of along with pending application, with direction to the I.O to file report under “C” class as suggested by him within 15 days.

After the statement of the I.O, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition and prayed that legal protection may be provided to the petitioners. The petition is disposed of along with pending application, with direction to the I.O to file report under “C” class as suggested by him within 15 days. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when they require. JUDGE JUDGE Naveed Ali
